case_title: MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. VS. NICOLE L HUNKIN ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: REDUCTION IN FILING FEE PURSUANT TO BUSINESS AND PROFESSIONS CODE SECTION 6322.1 (TRANSACTION ID # 210073202) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUNKIN, NICOLE L $1,198.01 PRINCIPAL, $275.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,473.01, SEE SCANNED DOC
